description.value:
The Akimichi clan is a product of the Fire Country, namely Konohagakure. They are a small clan of immensely powerful people who are often regarded as a gluttonous sort. Many of the Akimichi clansmen become squad leaders due to their power . Most of them also possess th e ability to alter their body size and mass. AKIMICHI CLAN (Occupation)**

Source: Mechanics/Character_Options/Occupations/Community Compendium/Akimichi Clan.md

Category: Community Compendium

Prerequisite: Age 8+

Class Skills: Select 3 from Concentration, Knowledge (Ninja Lore), Knowledge (Tactics), Listen, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu.

Feat: Select one from Akimichi Toughness, Brawl, Chakra Restoration, Combat Martial Arts, Combat Tactics, Combat Throw, Defensive Martial Arts, Endurance, Gouken, Great Fortitude, Harmony, Powerful Maneuvers, Improved Chakra Pool, Ninjutsu Adept, Nin Weapon Proficiency, Resist Poison, Taijutsu Adept, Toughness.

Wealth Bonus Increase: +1

Reputation Bonus Increase: +1

Affiliation: You require 1 less success to learn Akimichi Hijutsu techniques.
